title: phaseolus vulgaris var. carinatus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. carinatus, also known as the crested or bearded runner bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that is native to the Americas. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. carinatus include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes.
